title: Dark End Stone
body:
## 🪨 Dark End Stone Texture – Minecraft 1.21.8

Give the End a darker, more mysterious look!
This pack replaces the default End Stone texture with a new, shadowy version that fits better with moody, high-contrast builds and custom End dimensions.

### _Features:_

Darker and smoother End Stone texture

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.8

Perfect for fantasy or horror-style maps

Lightweight and easy to install

### _Installation:_
Place the ZIP file in your resourcepacks folder and enable it in the Resource Packs menu.

![End island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f154a623b1c9af863ed788da6d476ebc13542dc3_0.webp)

![Dark end stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac665c23129f1d4e2711914421db77f9e7b40cb_0.webp)
